case_title: LVNV FUNDING, L.L.C. VS. ANTHONY K CHENG et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING, L.L.C. AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, ANTHONY K C DOES 1 THROUGH 15 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-01-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-03-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-17-2006
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 15 INCLUSIVE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, ANTHONY K C

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING, L.L.C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHENG, ANTHONY K C $11,284.63 PRINCIPAL, $347.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,631.63, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $9,400.08 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $.00 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING, L.L.C.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-01-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
